g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the CLI interface design for LLM Lighthouse')
sendPrompt('What audits should go into the AEO score for LLM Lighthouse?')
sendPrompt('What audits should go into the GEO score for LLM Lighthouse?')
sendPrompt('How do we audit schema markup for AEO?')
sendPrompt('What does content clarity auditing look like for AI answers?')
sendPrompt('How would we measure entity salience for AEO?')
sendPrompt('What is question-answer density and why does it matter for AEO?')
sendPrompt('How would we measure citation likelihood for GEO?')
sendPrompt('How do we audit content freshness for GEO?')
sendPrompt('What is topical depth coverage in GEO?')
sendPrompt('How do we audit trust signals for GEO?')
sendPrompt('What should the scored report output look like for LLM Lighthouse?')
sendPrompt('What would the AI-powered fix suggestions look like?')
sendPrompt('How would the diff view work in LLM Lighthouse?')
sendPrompt('How would CI/CD integration work for LLM Lighthouse?')
sendPrompt('How do we crawl and parse URLs for auditing?')
sendPrompt('How would markdown and content file input work?')
sendPrompt('What CMS integrations make sense for LLM Lighthouse?')
sendPrompt('How would we use real LLM response data as a ground truth signal?')
sendPrompt('How should we weight AEO vs GEO scores in the overall composite score?')
sendPrompt('How would benchmark scoring work? Should scores be absolute or relative to a baseline?')
sendPrompt('Which LLMs should we probe in LLM probe mode and how do we normalize across them?')
